description: 6-dimension self-review scorecard for completed academic articles. Each dimension scores 0-10. Total >= 40/60 = pass.

dimensions.name: Structure & Coherence
criteria: Introduction opens with במאמר זה / בדף זה / במחקר זה
Introduction contains a roadmap of sections
Conclusion opens with לסיכום / מכל האמור עולה כי / בסיכומו של דבר
Conclusion returns to the thesis
Sections are ordered logically
Paragraph count per section is balanced

scoreGuide.10: All conventions met, logical order, balanced sections

dimensions.name: Argument Logic
criteria: Each section advances the thesis
No logical gaps between sections
Topic sentences clearly state the section's argument
Clear progression — no circular reasoning
Conclusion follows from body

scoreGuide.10: Every section advances thesis, no gaps, clear progression
scoreGuide.1: Sections don't connect to thesis, circular logic, gaps

dimensions.name: Citation Completeness
criteria: Every factual claim has a citation
No orphan citations (cited but never discussed)
Citation format is consistent throughout
Page numbers present where expected
Author names and work titles consistent across citations

scoreGuide.10: Every claim cited, consistent format, no orphans

dimensions.name: Source Coverage
criteria: All sources from outline actually used in article
No single source over-relied upon (>40% of citations)
Sources distributed across sections appropriately
Opposing viewpoints represented

scoreGuide.10: All sources used, balanced distribution, counter-arguments present
scoreGuide.1: Sources missing, over-reliance on one source

dimensions.name: Writing Quality
criteria: Writing matches the researcher's style fingerprint
Sentence length is varied
No grammar or spelling issues
Language register is consistently academic
No language purity violations (foreign terms in body text)

scoreGuide.1: Generic voice, grammar issues, register inconsistencies

dimensions.name: Academic Conventions
criteria: Linking words varied — not repeating the same connector
Linking words used in correct semantic context
Paragraph length appropriate (not too short, not too long)
Formal register maintained throughout
Transitions between sections smooth

scoreGuide.10: Rich variety of connectors, appropriate lengths, smooth transitions

scoring._comment: passThreshold mirrors thresholds.json:selfReview.passThreshold. Keep in sync.
